raw_text: the people never come to proper location even if the proper location is properly given . they messed up like 3 to 4 times and the calls never went through it's supposed to be coming in a instant but the calls are never working and the people messed up the location and it was all a frustrating experience

Super fast delivery and all products were fresh and well packed. The app is easy to use, delivery partner was polite, and the overall experience was excellent. Highly recommended for quick grocery shopping. Keep up the great work! Hello Blinkit Team, My name is Nishu Nix. I really like your service. Deliveries are always fast, products are fresh, and the overall experience is excellent. As a loyal customer, I would be grateful if you could provide me with a special discount coupon or offer

The varieties are many because of which I like this and gave 1star.But the stuff is way too overpriced in comparison to other instant delivery apps. I have seen other apps have way cheaper prices compared to this. The only good thing is variety...

edit: yeah great the app is always on high demand. so I have to buy 499 plus, u guys are only 2nd worst to casinos the free delivery for 149 should be reduce to 110. also they add unnecessary discount when you reach 149 to make you pay for delivery charge. it's pretty cunning

I have been a regular Blinkit customer, and my overall experience has always been excellent. The service is fast, reliable, and very convenient. Whenever I have needed assistance, the customer support team has been polite, responsive, and quick to resolve my concerns. Their commitment to customer satisfaction is truly appreciated. Thank you, Blinkit, for consistently providing such a great shopping experience. Highly recommended!😃😃

I accidentally ordered 4 quantities instead of 3. I requested a return for 1 item, and the support team handled it very efficiently. The return was processed smoothly, and the refund amount has also been credited successfully. Thank you for the excellent support.

Blinkit has made daily shopping incredibly convenient. The delivery is usually very fast, the app is easy to use, and there is a wide variety of products available at competitive prices. I especially appreciate the quick delivery service, which saves a lot of time during busy days. The packaging is neat, and customer support is helpful whenever needed. Overall, a reliable and efficient app for grocery and daily essentials shopping. Highly recommended!

I Great app for quick grocery delivery! The products are usually fresh, delivery is fast, and the app is easy to use. It saves a lot of time, especially for last-minute needs. Overall, a convenient and reliable service.

A worst experience where I had ordered some products from this app and those were available on other platforms comparatively at lower price, hence i had cancelled my order and my money deducted were given me as coupon instead of refunding to original payment method and moreover I had received a text message stating that coupon will expire in a month if nothing ordered. If I would not order anything or forget to order them my money without a cause will be gone. so I am uninstalling this app now.

worst app ever...i have placed an order with a proper location but the delivery agent seems to be confused about the location...I don't know why every time I place an order the app is showing different location to the delivery agent...it is not the issue of delivery agent it's the biggest issue of the app and app management...after placing an order with a proper location also I'm facing this issue every single time

They accept orders but do not deliver after 11pm We have to beg for a refund. This is such poor service—if they can't deliver after 11 pm, they should close their app. They open their app and accept orders but do not respond or deliver. What are we supposed to think about this?

Why this handling Fee, cut this off because Amazon Now is providing fresh items without any handling fee and Zepto also didn't have this handling fee and people want to save, even 5 rupees also so this 5 rupees, looks a lot; like a burden, in the bill.....!!!!!

Very disappointing experience. I ordered a Plant with Ibiza Pot but received only the pot (which is small and broken)—the plant was missing. Despite reporting it immediately and following up for over a week, Blinkit kept sending generic responses claiming the order was delivered successfully without addressing the actual issue. My refund/replacement was denied. Poor customer support and no accountability.

Extremely disappointed with my experience. The delivery agent behaved very rudely during the customer call and was completely unprofessional. On top of that, my order had missing items, which caused unnecessary inconvenience. This level of service is unacceptable. I expected better quality and customer support from Blinkit. I hope the company takes strict action to improve both delivery service and customer handling.
It started to feel like dynamic pricing. The price of certain items goes up if it thinks you're desperate enough to buy them, and it drops if it thinks you won't make the purchase otherwise.

Pathetic App They don't refund the amount even after picking up the return I have ordered diapers for my new born and they send me bigger size of diapers then I have asked for a return and they picked up the item but they are not refunding the amount. They don't even have customer support team only computer generated messages and emails you are going to receive.

this informed you all to. some time. these type of company doing scam with customers. they auto add the tip option in all the orders ??? who permit to them to this? and. I am unable to remove this. in single order we are unable to check deeply that tip was added in all the orders..this is worst experience.. i such.. thinking about that . not to do order this is my last order..

Dear Blinkit Team, I would like to request that the previous simple picking system be brought back. The old system was easier and more efficient because all items were clearly visible, which made picking faster and reduced confusion. In the current system, it is sometimes difficult to see and locate all items quickly, which can affect productivity and increase picking time. Please consider restoring the previous simple picking system or providing an option to use it. Thank you for your considera

they are into dark marketing practice the final bill does not appear at the time of checkout and 1 or 2 items are auto added in it we just make the payment and later we realise this is not what we wanted and there is no option to return or make complaint regarding this

Great experience overall! The delivery was quick, the app is easy to use, and most products were fresh and well-packed. Prices are reasonable, and the service is very convenient. a reliable app for everyday shopping.
